overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic desert city. The character moves from an industrial area under elevated monorail tracks, crosses a street with passing vehicles, and continues along a bridge walkway with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk under elevated monorail track

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated monorail structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large concrete and metal elevated train track structure spanning across the scene with support pillars
wide paved walkway with graffiti markings and scattered debris
metal barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the adjacent road
hazy desert mountain range visible in the background beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide concrete sidewalk under an elevated monorail track in an industrial district. The area is sparsely populated with a few pedestrians passing by, and the scene is dominated by the massive concrete infrastructure overhead and distant mountains on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing with industrial buildings and construction fencing

events.description: character turns right to cross the asphalt street
large black armored truck drives past from left to right on the road

agents.ego_description: turning right and crossing the asphalt street while monitoring the passing truck

notable_agents.action: large black armored military-style truck driving along the road from left to right

entered.detail: large matte black military-style truck with multiple axles and armored plating
multi-story industrial structure with smokestacks emitting white steam
metal construction fence with blue tarps covering the work area behind

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to cross the street as a large black armored truck passes by. The view opens to reveal industrial buildings with active smokestacks and construction fencing along the roadside, while the elevated track shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with holographic advertising

events.description: entering the shadowed area beneath the concrete overpass structure
character crosses the street intersection following a child running ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward a green holographic billboard and crossing the intersection

notable_agents.action: child in blue outfit running ahead toward the street intersection

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic advertisement floating above utility equipment
massive concrete support structure of the elevated highway creating shade
industrial electrical equipment with yellow and black warning stripes
scattered cardboard pieces and litter on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded area under the concrete overpass where a bright green holographic billboard glows against the industrial backdrop. After crossing the intersection following a running child, the scene transitions from the industrial zone toward a more open urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway with downtown skyline view

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area onto an open bridge with panoramic city views
motorcycle passes by on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the bridge walkway with the downtown skyline visible ahead, passing palm trees

notable_agents.action: motorcycle speeding past on the adjacent road

entered.detail: futuristic downtown skyscrapers with glass facades and neon accents visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the left side of the bridge walkway
solid concrete barrier with rectangular cutouts separating walkway from the lower level
large pink and red digital advertising screens on distant building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered area, the character walks along an open bridge with sweeping views of the futuristic downtown skyline. Palm trees line the walkway while neon billboards and glass towers dominate the distant view, and the elevated monorail track now runs parallel on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial district that gradually opens into a sweeping vista of a futuristic downtown skyline. It begins with the character walking along a wide concrete sidewalk beneath the massive infrastructure of an elevated monorail track, with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the character turns to cross the street, the view expands to reveal active smokestacks and industrial buildings while a large black armored truck passes by. The scene then shifts into the shade of a concrete overpass, where a glowing green holographic billboard illuminates the path before the camera follows a running child across the intersection. Finally, the character emerges from the covered area onto an open bridge lined with palm trees, where the industrial grit gives way to a horizon of neon billboards and towering glass skyscrapers.
